affiliations.display: 艾奎兹玄有限责任公司“C”小队

backstory.original: Curious, affable, and morbid, the drow heretic K'thriss Drow'b seeks the insane god-truth behind the veil of reality. As the 'C' Team's hoardsperson, he keeps an eye out for occult relics that could aid him in his unearthly quest.
backstory.display: 好奇、和善而病态的卓尔精灵异端，克里斯·卓尔博在现实的面纱背后寻求疯狂的神之真相。作为 C 小队的仓储管理员，他一直在留意那些可以帮他完成奇异追求的神秘遗物。

description.original: K'thriss telepathically whispers a discordant melody that damages and slows a random enemy.
description.display: 克里斯用心灵感应低声吟唱一首刺耳的旋律，对一名随机敌人造成伤害和减速。

description.original: K'thriss summons a horde of tentacles that damage all enemies.
description.display: 克里斯召唤一群触手，对所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: K'thriss summons a horde of tentacles across the battlefield that damage all enemies.
longDescription.display: 克里斯在战场上召唤一群触手，对所有敌人造成伤害。

description.desc: K'thriss' unseen servant, Velvet, increases the damage of Champions not adjacent to K'thriss by $amount% for each affected Champion, stacking multiplicatively.
每有一名不与克里斯相邻的勇士，克里斯的隐形仆从丝绒会使这些勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: K'thriss' unseen servant, Velvet, increases the damage of Champions not adjacent to K'thriss.
tipText.display: 克里斯的隐形仆从丝绒会使不与克里斯相邻的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: K'thriss' keen eyes spy gold from enemy kills that the party misses. He gathers this gold to empower his own abilities ($coins_per_enemy coin per enemy killed, $coins_per_boss coins per boss enemy killed), and increases the effect of Unseen Encouragement and your party's gold find by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each coin he has collected on the current adventure, stacking additively.
克里斯敏锐的眼睛会发现探险队遗漏的被击杀敌人掉落的金币。他会收集这些金币来强化他自己的技能（每名被击杀的敌人 $coins_per_enemy 枚金币，每名被击杀的首领 $coins_per_boss 枚金币），并且他在当前冒险中每收集到一枚金币，他会使“无形鼓励”的效果和探险队的金币寻获量提高 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: K'thriss collects extra coins from defeated enemies and uses them to empower a Shadow Demon that he summons when he uses his Ultimate Ability.
tipText.display: 克里斯会从被击败的敌人那里收集到额外的金币，并用这些金币来强化一个他使用杀招技能时会召唤出来的影魔。

description.desc: Unlocks K'thriss' ultimate ability. When K'thriss uses his ultimate ability he summons a Shadow Demon that hovers behind him for $duration___2 seconds. For its duration, the Shadow Demon has various effects based on how many coins K'thriss has gathered since the last time the Shadow Demon was summoned.
解锁克里斯的杀招技能。当克里斯使用他的杀招技能时，他会召唤一个影魔，在他身后徘徊 $duration___2 秒。在这段时间内，根据克里斯上次召唤影魔以来收集到的金币数量，影魔会有不同的效果。

K'thriss uses his creative accounting skills to skim a little bit off the gold you spend to level up Champions and uses it to empower his abilities. For each order of magnitude of gold spent leveling up other Champions, he increases the effect of Unseen Encouragement by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively.
克里斯运用他富有创造力的会计技巧，从你用于提升勇士等级的金币中抽一小部分出来，用于强化他自己的技能。用于提升其他勇士等级的金币每达到一个数量级，他会使“无形鼓励”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
The effect of Unseen Encouragement is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each slot away from K'thriss an affected Champion is, stacking multiplicatively.
受“无形鼓励”影响的勇士与克里斯每相隔一格，“无形鼓励”的效果就提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: K'thriss contacts his unseen servant Velvet to increase the damage of Champions that are far from him in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 克里斯会让他隐形的仆从“丝绒”为阵型中与他相隔较远的勇士提升伤害。

description.desc: The effect of Unseen Encouragement and the gold find bonus of Hoardsperson are increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each C-Team, Acquisitions Incorporated, or Wafflecrew Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名“C”小队、艾奎兹玄有限责任公司或华夫饼小队的勇士，“无形鼓励”的效果和“囤积者”的金币寻获量加成就提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: K'thriss's familiar Ligotti empowers the formation's damage and gold find abilities based on the number of Champions that are part of his favorite Acquisitions Incorporated affiliations.
specializationDescription.display: 克里斯的魔宠利戈蒂会根据阵型中属于他最喜欢的“艾奎兹玄有限责任公司”从属组织的勇士数量，强化阵型的伤害和金币寻获技能。

description.desc: The effect of Unseen Encouragement is increased by $amount%. This amount is reduced by $per_enemy_reduction% for each enemy defeated in the current area, applying multiplicatively for up to $max_reductions enemies.
“无形鼓励”的效果提高 $amount%。当前区域内每有一名敌人被击败，这个数值就减少 $per_enemy_reduction%，以乘算方式生效，被击败的敌人数量达到 $max_reductions 时达到上限。

specializationDescription.original: K'thriss's Patron Ur provides a big increase to his buffs, decreasing as enemies are defeated in the current area.
specializationDescription.display: 克里斯的赞助者乌尔会大幅提升他的增益，但提升的数值会随着当前区域内被击败的敌人数量增加而下降。

description.original: I collect the coin for the good of us all.
description.display: 我收集硬币是为了大家好。

description.original: Ligotti is the real leader here!
description.display: 利戈蒂是这里真正的首领！

description.original: In times like this I ask 'what would an accountant do?'
description.display: 每当这种时候，我都会问“会计师会怎么做？”

description.original: I suppose I could spare a few coin...
description.display: 我想，我可以腾出一点钱......

description.original: It will cost more, but I think it will help with employee morale!
description.display: 虽然开销更大，但我认为这将有助于提高员工的士气！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of K'thriss' Unseen Encouragement ability by $amount%

description.original: We COULD get more Champions OR we could hit things harder!
description.display: 我们可以招募更多勇士，也可以更努力地战斗！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of K'thriss' Unseen Encouragement ability by $amount%

description.original: What Velvet does is their own choice.
description.display: 丝绒要怎么做，那是它自己的选择。

description.original: I'll take you on a mystical magic tour.
description.display: 我会带领你们走进一场神秘魔法之旅。

description.original: Accounting can be mysterious at times, but it is also important.
description.display: 会计学有时候会很神秘，但也很重要。

effects.description: Increases the drop chance of coins from K'thriss' Hoardsperson ability by $amount%

description.original: Sacrifices must be made for the good of the company.
description.display: 为了公司的利益，必须做出牺牲。

description.original: Improved efficiencies lead to improved yield, or so I've heard.
description.display: 效率提高了，产量也会提高，至少我是这么听说的。

description.original: Life and death must be in balance, like a checkbook.
description.display: 生和死必须平衡，就像支票簿的收支必须平衡一样。

description.original: I seem to be stronger. I can push this book cart even faster.
description.display: 我好像更强壮了。我推动这辆运书车的速度更快了。

description.original: This body will need to be at its best to do what must be done.
description.display: 这个身体必须保持最佳状态，才能完成必须完成的事。

description.original: Now, now, little lambs. There will be time for frolic later.
description.display: 乖，乖，小羊羔。以后会有时间给你们玩的。

effects.description: Prevents familiars from automatically activating K'thriss' ultimate attack until he's gathered 1,000 coins

description.original: What was once the me within is now the me without.
description.display: 如今我向外界展现的自我，已与内心构想的自我形象完全吻合。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%, sets K'thriss' gender to Nonbinary, and sets K'thriss' age to 80

description.original: We've all been working so hard, I just thought perhaps we all deserve a little treat.
description.display: 我们大家都工作得那么辛苦，我就想着也许我们都应该得到一点犒赏。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of K'thriss' Unseen Encouragement ability by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Curious, affable, and morbid, the drow heretic K'thriss Drow'b seeks the insane god-truth behind the veil of reality. As the 'C' Team's hoardsperson, he keeps an eye out for occult relics that could aid him in his unearthly quest.
character_sheet_details.system_description: K'thriss buffs those not adjacent to him and 'borrows' some of the formations gold to empower a friendly Shadow Demon.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 好奇、和善而病态的卓尔精灵异端，克里斯·卓尔博在现实的面纱背后寻求疯狂的神之真相。作为 C 小队的仓储管理员，他一直在留意那些可以帮他完成奇异追求的神秘遗物。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 克里斯会为不与他相邻的勇士提供增益，并“借来”部分队伍所获得的金币来强化友方影魔。

original.name: Dissonant Whispers
original.description: K'thriss telepathically whispers a discordant melody that damages and slows a random enemy.

display.name: 不谐低语

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领

display.description: 如今我向外界展现的自我，已与内心构想的自我形象完全吻合。

effects.description: 使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，使克里斯变成非二元性别，使克里斯的年龄变成 80 岁

original.description: We've all been working so hard, I just thought perhaps we all deserve a little treat.
